name: Life Begins
description: Learn the basics of ecosystems by building a simple food chain.
objective: Keep all organisms alive for 20 turns
science_facts: Plants are producers - they create energy from the sun
Herbivores are primary consumers - they eat plants
Carnivores are secondary consumers - they eat herbivores
Food chains show the flow of energy through ecosystems
hints: Make sure you have enough plants for the rabbits
Population growth depends on available food
